description_long: This is a modern, upright refrigerator with a minimalist design, featuring a smooth, light gray exterior. The appliance has two main compartments: a larger upper section with a vertical handle on the left and a lower drawer with a horizontal handle, likely for freezer storage. The sides are plain and unadorned, while the back is a darker panel, possibly for ventilation or access to mechanical components. The handles are subtly integrated, with the upper handle being a slim vertical bar and the lower one a wide, slightly curved horizontal bar. The overall form is boxy and robust, with clean lines and a matte finish. No visible branding, control panels, or decorative elements are present.
description: A sleek, light gray refrigerator with a two-compartment design, featuring minimalist vertical and horizontal handles and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing both the vertical handle on the upper door and the wide horizontal handle on the lower drawer.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, unadorned side panel and the slim profile of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a dark, featureless back panel, likely for ventilation or mechanical access.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the handles' curvature slightly visible.
attribute_door_handle_style: Upper handle is a slim, vertical, slightly protruding bar on the left; lower handle is a wide, curved, horizontal bar integrated into the drawer front.
